g.text: C Official raster and station anchor agree in sign

text.style: font-size: 6.6px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #5d6f7f

g.text: Evidence role: panels A-B test transfer and single-region dependence; panel C is an external sign-control probe, not dense validation of the lead case.
